description: Evidence about the existence, beta, and structure of Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibria that admit the H3 quartic Alfven minimum.

open_questions.question: Are the implicit-headline claim(s) A_07 actually intended to generalize across this group, or do their authors scope them more narrowly than the propagator assumes?

suggested_next_steps.description: Read each implicit-headline claim's source paper and decide whether to add explicit out-of-regime predictions or to mark the claim as scoped only to its home regime.
suggested_next_steps.title: Scope verification

scope.framework: MHD literature; ideal MHD Atlas H1-H5

title: Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibrium constructions
